## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun run check-ts` passes
- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] User-visible changes added to `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, or large binaries committed
- [ ] I agree to license this contribution under AGPL-3.0-or-later
